title: Lambda Wars Beta

notes: Game starts and can be played. Single-player missions can be played, tutorial can be played. Problem is that starting the lobby for any other game does not work, making it impossible to play custom games against AI or to host lobby for online game. Unless there are some alternative ways of starting a match against AI / an online lobby that I am not aware of.
